raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The Government Accountability Package establishes a public online portal to track annual spending on homelessness and mental health programs.",
    "The public online portal aims to ensure that resources for homelessness and mental health are allocated effectively.",
    "AB 496 mandates the Legislative Analyst’s Office to conduct an annual evaluation of the Employment Development Department’s services.",
    "AB 496 measures key performance metrics such as claim processing times, customer service responsiveness, and fraud prevention efforts.",
    "AB 505 requires a comprehensive evaluation of the Homekey program’s impact on homelessness, ensuring the program meets its goals.",
    "The Government Accountability Package reflects a commitment to fiscal responsibility and program effectiveness.",
    "Increasing transparency through independent evaluations empowers lawmakers and the public regarding taxpayer dollar usage."
  ]
}
```
